name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-85
title: rabbit-config.py: SKILL.md description still mentions 'permissions [lock|unlock]' but spec only documents lock and unlock
description: skills/rabbit-config/SKILL.md frontmatter description: 'permissions [lock|unlock] (repo file write protection)'. The script accepts EXACTLY lock or unlock and rejects everything else with 'Error: permissions requires lock or unlock'. Spec.md line 134-136 documents these correctly. However the SKILL.md body 'CLI Surface' table at line 36-38 uses 'lock|unlock' (with literal pipe) instead of bracketed-mandatory notation. Consistency check across SKILL frontmatter, body table, USAGE in script, and spec.md would catch this drift. Not a behavioral bug; documentation drift.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup: bug invalid — see triage notes in tdd-report-rabbit-cage.json
